Introduction
    Micky Flanagan: Peeping Behind the Curtain is a TV movie starring Micky Flanagan, Jimmy Carr, and Nina Conti. A backstage pass to Micky Flanagan's career, from early raw material in the East End to staging the world's biggest comedy...
